channel.title: TGaceAllStories
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from TGaceAllStories, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Here’s how strong the S&P 500 performs when inflation is falling rather than rising
item.description: S&P returns when CPI is falling average 18.5% and inflation may be falling even faster than official data suggest

item.title: Why ECB’s Lagarde may leave her post early
item.description: The Financial Times is reporting Lagarde may leave her office a year ahead of schedule. The ECB hasn’t denied it.

item.title: Musician Post Malone’s childhood home in Texas is up for sale for just $549,000
item.description: Post Malone’s “famous” childhood home in Texas has hit the market for $549,000—over a decade after he traded the Lone Star State for California amid h...

item.title: Stanley Druckenmiller made a big bet on this country, and it’s already paid off
item.description: Famed investor Stanley Druckenmiller, who mentored both Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent and Fed Chair nominee Kevin Warsh, looks to have already made...

item.title: ‘His credit rating is wrecked’: My son and his girlfriend mingled their finances. Big mistake.
item.description: “She was a shopper and spent over $1,000 a month on weight-loss drugs.”

item.title: Ackman's Pershing Square bet big on Amazon in fourth quarter
item.description: Bill Ackman's Pershing Square poured hundreds of millions of dollars into Amazon shares as 2025 wrapped up.

item.title: David Tepper adds to big Micron position, gets bullish on Korean stocks
item.description: The billionaire investor boosted his stake in Micron by 200%, meaning the memory maker crucial to AI systems is now the fund's fourth-largest holding.

item.title: Wednesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
item.description: The S&P 500 posted a narrow gain on Tuesday as losses in software stocks weighed on the market.

item.title: Third Point opens positions in Spotify and Chipotle, doubles stake in train stock Union Pacific
item.description: The Spotify and Chipotle buys came amid rough quarters for the stocks.

item.title: We may be on the cusp of a new industrial cycle, says Bank of America. How to play it — and score attractive yields
item.description: Bank of America sees opportunity for income as industrial growth takes off.

item.title: Valaris Stock Soars on $5.8B Transocean Acquisition
item.description: Valaris (VAL) shares close up 34.31% on news of a $5.8 billion all-stock acquisition by Transocean (RIG), creating a major offshore drilling powerhous...

item.title: Silicon Labs Soars on Texas Instruments Buyout Deal
item.description: Listen up, folks! If you’re scanning the markets today, you’ve got to see what’s happening with Silicon Labs (SLAB). As of this writing, shares have e...

item.title: Biotech Stocks Skyrocket on Game-Changing News
item.description: Discover why biotech stocks like CRVS and RAPT are surging today on trial breakthroughs and deals. Learn trading insights and risks in this exciting m...

item.title: SelectQuote Surges 23% on $415M Credit Facility News
item.description: SelectQuote (SLQT) stock jumped 23% on January 12, 2026 after securing a $415M credit facility. Dive into the details, risks, benefits, and how simila...

item.title: Monte Rosa Therapeutics (GLUE) Soars on Promising Inflammation Drug Data
item.description: Monte Rosa Therapeutics (GLUE) stock surges over 42% on positive Phase 1 data for MRT-8102, showing profound reductions in inflammation marker hsCRP. ...
